content:
# Recommendations ‚Äî next plan iter (post iter-037)

## Closest-to-completion ‚Äî PRIORITIZE
- **`pushforward_lax_mu_comparison_lhs_tmul` (TensorObjSubstrate.lean) ‚Äî Route A, the seed-1 bottleneck.**
  Telescope steps 1‚Äì2 committed + lake-verified; BOTH missing helpers now in-file
  (`pushforwardPushforwardAdj_counit_app_app_apply`, `restrictScalars_Œ¥_app_tmul`). Residual = steps 3‚Äì4:
  - (3) Œ¥ leg: `conv` into the inner `(G.map Œ¥).app W`, `pushforward_map_app_apply` reindex, peel
    `Œ¥ GŒ≤ = RS.map(Œ¥ pf0) ‚â´ Œ¥ RS` via `Functor.OplaxMonoidal.comp` (`Œ¥ pf0 = ùüô` `rfl`), discharge `Œ¥ RS`
    on the pure tensor by `restrictScalars_Œ¥_app_tmul` (instantiate-then-`erw` template).
  - (4) counit pair: `ModuleCat ‚Ä¶ tensorHom_tmul` split, collapse each `hadj'.counit.app _` by
    `pushforwardPushforwardAdj_counit_app_app_apply`; then open-immersion triangle cancel
    (`adj.left/right_triangle` on opens) ‚Üí `m ‚äó‚Çú n = RHS` (`pushforward_lax_mu_comparison_rhs_tmul`, proven).
  - **NOTE for planner:** each step is another instantiate-then-`erw` round against carrier-diamond objects
    on a >4800-LOC file with ~20k-token goal queries ‚Äî token-heavy but mechanically de-risked. Roadmap is in-code.

## Reusable proof patterns discovered (for Knowledge Base)
- **Instantiate-then-`erw` for carrier-diamond value lemmas:** state a ‚àÄ-`have` over an ABSTRACT ring functor
  `R` (so `R ‚ãô forget‚ÇÇ` matches the `MonoidalCategoryStruct` instance head syntactically ‚Äî dodges the
  `PresheafOfModules X.ringCatSheaf.obj` vs `_ ‚ãô forget‚ÇÇ` diamond), instantiate at the goal's concrete
  objects, then `erw`. Bare `rw`/`erw`/`simp only` silently no-op on the diamond; `set` infers the heavy
  type and `MonoidalCategoryStruct` synth fails.
- **Helper type fixes on this seam:** counit value-lemma binder is the BIG composite object
  `((pushforward œà ‚ãô pushforward œÜ).obj N).obj U`, NOT the section `N.obj U` (counit ‚âÝ symmetric to unit);
  Œ¥ pure-tensor RHS `m ‚äó‚Çú n` must be ascribed to the codomain tensor object so the `restrictScalars`
  R-module instance resolves.
- **LSP STALE-GREEN:** on this file `lean_diagnostic_messages` reports 0 errors while `lake build` is RED.
  Always confirm with `lake build`.

## Blueprint debt ‚Äî planner action (from lean-vs-blueprint-checker substrate037, MAJOR √ó2)
1. **`restrictScalars_Œ¥_app_tmul` ‚Äî author a blueprint block (1-to-1 coverage debt).** New `private` lemma
   ~L2137, Œ¥-twin of `lem:restrictscalars_mu_app_tmul`. Deps to wire in `\uses`: `Functor.Monoidal.Œº_Œ¥`,
   `lem:restrictscalars_mu_app_tmul`. (Still in `dag-query unmatched`; total unmatched = 107, mostly
   pre-existing aux helpers ‚Äî full restoration is a separate backlog, but THIS one is new this iter.)
2. **Expand the `lhs_tmul` blueprint sketch (`lem:pushforward_lax_mu_comparison_lhs_tmul`).** Currently says
   "the three legs compose to the identity" but never previews the adjunction **triangle cancellation**
   (the unit-leg's `counit`-restriction vs the counit-pair's `unit`-restriction) that is the actual content
   behind the sorry, and frames the Œ¥-leg via the Œº lemmas rather than the new Œ¥-value lemma. A blueprint-writer
   round would de-risk steps 3‚Äì4. NOT a must-fix (Lean-mechanics, not under-spec blocking) but recommended
   before the next Route A prover round per the HARD GATE spirit.

## Lean hygiene ‚Äî refactor-route (from lean-auditor iter037, MAJOR √ó1 + MINOR √ó2, none blocking)
- **MAJOR:** header docstring mixes pre-Archon iter-numbers (250‚Äì261) with current Archon numbers (022‚Äì037)
  unlabelled ‚Üí future-agent misread risk. Deterministic comment fix (refactor subagent, not a prover lane).
- **MINOR:** ~10 stale L-number cross-refs in dev comments (4‚Äì52 lines off); 2 long-line lints in the new
  `restrictScalars_Œ¥_app_tmul` docstring. Cosmetic; batch with the header fix.

## Route B ‚Äî UNBLOCK BEFORE DISPATCH (iter-038 scheduled per the binding interleave)
- **`TensorObjInverse.lean` is RED at SOURCE, predating this iter:** parse-time syntax error `399:38`
  (`unexpected identifier`) + unsolved goals at 338/379; `.olean` never built. This is NOT a regression from
  the Route A root churn (a syntax error can't be induced by an imported edit). The scheduled iter-038 Route B
  lane MUST first repair its own source before any `trivialisation_restrict_compat` work. Flag this to the
  Route B prover explicitly so it doesn't mistake the breakage for a build-race artifact.

## Do NOT retry (blocked approaches)
- bare `rw`/`erw`/`simp only` of `tensorObj_map_tmul` on the heavy `‚äó`; `set GA := ‚Ä¶` tensor fold;
  second `rw [pushforward_map_app_apply]` on the inner Œ¥ leg; naive counit binder `y : N.obj U`;
  bare Œ¥ RHS `m ‚äó‚Çú[R] n`. (All confirmed DEAD this iter.)
- The iter-035 abstract `{C D : Type*}` helper model for `lhs_tmul` ‚Äî value is irreducibly
  PresheafOfModules-specific (settled iter-036, re-confirmed iter-037). Do not re-propose.
